E205_I: PRIOR_CONTRACTS_DOMAINS iff contraction under GRADED > 200 grade-permutation nulls (plus-one p<.05, Holm over 2 baselines); else PRIOR_GENERIC/PRIOR_INERT
E205_A3: L2 iff merge/split shifts a preregistered statistic beyond its 95% bootstrap band, >=2/3 sites
E205_B: site claim only if accuracy beats permutation null AFTER sign-identity control
